title: Signal Ring gives blood pressure readings, not just alerts like Apple Watch
summary: Five Apple Watch models are able to measure your blood pressure in order to generate alerts for possible hypertension. However, they do not provide your actual blood pressure readings. A few smart rings and other fitness devices do so, but rely on regular calibration with a traditional cuff monitor.
